parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
skinparam backgroundColor #F4F1E1
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor #00BFFF
    ActorBorderColor #00BFFF
    LifeLineBorderColor #0000FF
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #A9D0F5
    ParticipantBorderColor #1E90FF
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #1E90FF
    ParticipantFontColor white
    ParticipantFontSize 17
    ParticipantFontName Arial
    ActorBackgroundColor #00BFFF
    ActorFontColor #00BFFF
    ActorFontSize 17
    ActorFontName Arial
}

note over developer, HOTFIX
Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten
end note

actor developer
participant DEV
participant TEST
participant MASTER
participant HOTFIX

DEV -> TEST : 1 增量换包到TEST
activate TEST #B0E0E6
TEST -> MASTER : 2 测试通过后，基于TEST打tag
TEST -> MASTER : 3 check release分支
TEST -> MASTER : 4 将release分支合并到MASTER
activate MASTER #B0E0E6
MASTER -> HOTFIX : 5 ，线上紧急问题，基于MASTER check HOTFIX分支
MASTER -> HOTFIX : 6 ，开发基于HOTFIX分支check本地分支修复问题
MASTER -> HOTFIX : 7 修复完成后合回HOTFIX分支
activate HOTFIX #B0E0E6
HOTFIX -> MASTER : 8 用CMP工具基于HOTFIX打包换到测试环境进行验证
HOTFIX -> MASTER : 9 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回MASTER
HOTFIX -> TEST : 10 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回TEST
deactivate MASTER
deactivate TEST
HOTFIX -> DEV : 11 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回DEV
deactivate HOTFIX

@enduml
```
